title: Describe your weekend
subtitle: Talk about simple past and plans.
overview: Talk about simple past and plans.
Read the English aloud, understand the Chinese, then answer with your own real information.

sections.title: A1 focus
rows: This weekend, I am going to rest.
What did you do last weekend?
I stayed home and watched a movie.
我待在家，看了一部电影。

items.en: This weekend, I am going to rest.
What did you do last weekend?
I stayed home and watched a movie.
items.zh: 我待在家，看了一部电影。

items.en: Now make one sentence about your real life.
items.zh: 现在造一个关于你真实生活的句子。

items.en: Read it aloud three times: slow, clear, natural.

lines.speaker: A
lines.en: What did you do last weekend?

lines.speaker: B
lines.en: I stayed home and watched a movie.
lines.zh: 我待在家，看了一部电影。

lines.speaker: A
lines.en: Can you say it one more time, slowly?

lines.speaker: B
lines.en: I stayed home and watched a movie.
lines.zh: 我待在家，看了一部电影。

items.en: This weekend, I am going to rest.
Change one word and say it again.
Use the sentence today if you can.
items.zh: 如果可以，今天就使用这个句子。
